hero.badge: Developed from day-to-day hotel operations · Structured · Ready to use
hero.title: Operational Clarity for High-End Hospitality
hero.subtitle: Documented standards, clear procedures, and practical tools developed from how hotel teams work day to day. Designed to be used immediately, across departments.

problem.title: Why Hotel Operations Break Down
problem.text: Most hotels, regardless of category, face the same core issues: standards that shift with staff changes, processes that exist only in people's heads, and the ongoing pressure of turnover. LuxOps gives teams the structure and documentation to work consistently, regardless of who's on shift.
problem.point1_text: When standards aren't written down, guest experience depends on who's working. Consistency starts with documentation.
problem.point2_text: When a team member leaves, they take their knowledge with them. Documented processes protect what's been built, and make onboarding faster.
problem.point3_text: Without structured guides, every new hire starts from scratch. Clear documentation cuts integration time and reduces errors from day one.

solution.title: Structured SOPs & Playbooks for Hotel Teams
solution.text: We take operational knowledge built from years of running hotel departments and structure it into practical tools your teams can use daily, at every stage of the guest experience.

offers.title: Hotel SOP Templates, Training & Quality Audit
offers.digital_desc: Playbooks and Notion templates your team can start using the same day. No setup required.
offers.audit_desc: An in-depth quality audit and custom process design built around how your property actually works.
offers.training_desc: Hands-on training run on your property, with your team. Half-day and full-day formats available.

cta_section.title: Looking to strengthen your operations?
cta_section.text: Whether you need a practical tool or a structured review of your operations, we can help.

playbooks_page.title: Operational Playbooks
playbooks_page.subtitle: Documented SOPs built from the way hotel departments actually run. Designed to help teams work more consistently, onboard faster, and apply standards more clearly across daily operations.
playbooks_page.product_intro: Each playbook is written as a working operational document: procedures, service standards, checklists, and guidance designed for team use, not shelf storage.
playbooks_page.bundle_subtitle: The full set of core operational playbooks, for properties that want a consistent structure across all departments.
playbooks_page.playbook1_desc: Check-in/out procedures, guest communication protocols, upselling techniques, night audit, PMS systems and concierge standards.
playbooks_page.playbook2_desc: Room inspection checklists, linen management, turndown service protocols, and deep cleaning procedures.
playbooks_page.playbook3_desc: Restaurant service standards, bar operations, room service protocols, and banquet service procedures.
playbooks_page.playbook4_desc: Treatment protocols, therapist standards, booking management, and wellness programme structure.

notion_page.title: Notion Templates
notion_page.subtitle: Operational workspaces structured around the way hotel teams work day to day. Procedures, task tracking, reporting, and team coordination, all in one place.
notion_page.base_desc: A working management base covering the daily functions hotels usually track across too many separate systems. Structured for immediate use, easy to maintain, and built around how hotel teams actually operate.
notion_page.custom_desc: For properties that want the workspace adapted to their structure, standards, and internal workflows. Built around your departments, your procedures, and your team's way of working.

audit_page.title: Quality Audit
audit_page.subtitle: A 2-day operational audit designed to identify where standards weaken, where execution breaks down, and where the property needs clearer structure.
audit_page.subtitle_context: This is not a theoretical review. It is an on-site assessment built to help management make practical, prioritised decisions based on what is actually happening across departments.
audit_page.step1_desc: Review of existing procedures, current standards, and how operations are managed day to day. The audit begins before the first day on site.
audit_page.step2_desc: Two days across departments, observing service execution, team coordination, room inspections, shift handovers, and physical standards. Based on what is seen, not what is reported.
audit_page.step3_desc: Clear findings structured by department, operational gap analysis, and prioritised recommendations. Written for practical use, not for archive.
audit_page.step4_desc: A structured improvement plan delivered in a clear, actionable format. Management receives a prioritised picture of what needs to change, in what order, and where the fastest gains are.
audit_page.deliverables_intro: The output is a set of working documents designed to support operational decisions, not a generic consultant report.
audit_page.cta_subtitle: If you have a property in mind, share the context and we will confirm whether this format is the right fit.
audit_page.what_we_review_title: What we look at on site
audit_page.what_we_review_intro: These are the areas where inconsistency tends to begin, particularly when standards exist on paper but are not consistently applied in practice.
audit_page.wr1: Physical standards and room inspection methods
audit_page.wr2: Service execution and sequencing by department
audit_page.wr4: Existing documentation and how it is actually used

process_page.title: Custom Process Creation
process_page.subtitle: Complete process creation for any hotel department, built around your standards, your teams, and the way your property actually runs.
process_page.subtitle_context: For hotels that need clear documentation, usable procedures, and more consistent execution across shifts and departments.
process_page.desc: We write complete SOPs for any hotel department, formatted for print or Notion. We can work from your existing documentation or build new processes entirely from scratch.
process_page.cta_title: Ready to put clearer structure behind the way your teams operate?
process_page.wu1: A department still running on verbal habits with little or no written structure
process_page.wu2: A new opening, repositioning, or rebranding that needs documentation from the ground up
process_page.wu3: A team where execution varies too much from one person or shift to another
process_page.wu4: A post-audit situation where gaps have been identified and need to be turned into usable procedures
process_page.what_we_build_intro: Typical outputs include the tools departments need most to run consistently, onboard faster, and reduce guesswork in daily execution.

training_page.title: On-Property Training
training_page.subtitle: Training built around your teams, your standards, and your operational reality.
training_page.training_context: Delivered on-site and designed to help teams apply procedures with more consistency, more confidence, and less reliance on informal knowledge. Adapted to your department, team level, and the way your property actually works.
training_page.half_desc: Best for targeted rollout, standard refreshers, or one specific operational priority. Focused format with practical exercises.
training_page.full_desc: Designed for departments needing broader alignment: multiple topics, guided practice, and time to work through procedures with the team.
training_page.topics_intro: Topics are always adapted to the department, team level, and operational context. Sessions typically cover some or all of the following.
training_page.cta_title: Ready to align your team around clearer standards?

about_page.title: About LuxOps
about_page.subtitle: Structured operations tools for independent luxury hotels, boutique properties, and hotel groups who want to raise standards without starting from scratch.
about_page.story_p1: Most hotel operations run on informal knowledge: the check-in sequence each agent handles slightly differently, the housekeeping inspection that depends on who is on shift, the onboarding that relies on whoever happens to have time. When that knowledge leaves, the standard leaves with it.
about_page.story_p2: The frameworks behind LuxOps were built inside real hotel operations: independent 4- and 5-star properties, boutique groups, and multi-department environments across Europe where a drop in service quality is not an option. Each tool was created out of operational necessity, not to produce documents, but to make teams easier to lead and operations easier to run.
about_page.story_p3: LuxOps exists to make those methods available to any property, without the cost of building them from scratch.
about_page.v1_desc: Every tool is designed to be used on the floor, not filed away. If it does not make the day-to-day easier for a supervisor or team lead, it is not finished.
about_page.v2_desc: Generic SOP templates skip the situations that matter most. Our procedures cover standard interactions and the exceptions: the cases where consistency is hardest and most important.
about_page.v3_desc: The standards, language, and level of detail throughout reflect the expectations of 4- and 5-star hospitality. Properties at that level cannot use generic formats without significant adaptation.
